languages.text: {n}Мобильные отряды были оснащены мощными вокс-рупорами. Последовательность звуковых волн, транслируемая динамиками, исказила сигнал, принимаемый Погонщицами. Обезумевшие ксеносущества принялись рвать и уничтожать друг друга, что дало меровским бойцам огромное преимущество в бою. Вскоре популяция Погонщиц значительно сократилась.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Мобильные отряды были оснащены мощными вокс-рупорами. Последовательность звуковых волн, транслируемая динамиками, исказила сигнал, принимаемый Погонщицами. Обезумевшие ксеносущества принялись рвать и уничтожать друг друга, что дало меровским бойцам огромное преимущество в бою. Вскоре популяция Погонщиц значительно сократилась.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The mobile teams were equipped with powerful vox-hailers. The sequence of sound waves broadcast through the speakers disrupted the signal received by the Drovers. The enraged xenos creatures turned upon one another, tearing each other apart and granting the Merovian fighters a tremendous advantage in the battle. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die mobilen Teams wurden mit leistungsfähigen Voxlautsprechern ausgestattet. Die von den Lautsprechern übertragene Sequenz von Schallwellen störte das von den Treibern empfangene Signal. Die wütenden Xenox-Kreaturen rissen sich daraufhin gegenseitig in Stücke und verschafften den merovianischen Kämpfern in der Schlacht einen beträchtlichen Vorteil. Wenig später war die Population der Treiber deutlich geschwächt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mobile teams were equipped with powerful vox-hailers. The sequence of sound waves broadcast through the speakers disrupted the signal received by the Drovers. The enraged xenos creatures turned upon one another, tearing each other apart and granting the Merovian fighters a tremendous advantage in the battle. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die mobilen Teams wurden mit leistungsfähigen Voxlautsprechern ausgestattet. Die von den Lautsprechern übertragene Sequenz von Schallwellen störte das von den Treibern empfangene Signal. Die wütenden Xenox-Kreaturen rissen sich daraufhin gegenseitig in Stücke und verschafften den merovianischen Kämpfern in der Schlacht einen beträchtlichen Vorteil. Wenig später war die Population der Treiber deutlich geschwächt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}On dota les escouades mobiles de puissants voxophones, la séquence d'ondes sonores émises par les haut-parleurs parasitant le signal reçu par les Chasseurs. Les xénos enragés se mirent à s'attaquer les uns les autres et à s'entredéchirer, ce qui permit aux combattants meroviens de prendre le dessus. En un rien de temps, la population de Chasseurs fut drastiquement réduite.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mobile teams were equipped with powerful vox-hailers. The sequence of sound waves broadcast through the speakers disrupted the signal received by the Drovers. The enraged xenos creatures turned upon one another, tearing each other apart and granting the Merovian fighters a tremendous advantage in the battle. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}On dota les escouades mobiles de puissants voxophones, la séquence d'ondes sonores émises par les haut-parleurs parasitant le signal reçu par les Chasseurs. Les xénos enragés se mirent à s'attaquer les uns les autres et à s'entredéchirer, ce qui permit aux combattants meroviens de prendre le dessus. En un rien de temps, la population de Chasseurs fut drastiquement réduite.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Se equipó a los equipos móviles con potentes vocomegáfonos. La secuencia de ondas de sonido de los aparatos interrumpía la señal que recibían los Pastores. Las criaturas xenos enfurecidas se volvieron contra sus camaradas con brutalidad, lo que proporcionó a los guerreros merovianos una inmensa ventaja en la batalla. La población de Pastores no tardó en verse muy reducida.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mobile teams were equipped with powerful vox-hailers. The sequence of sound waves broadcast through the speakers disrupted the signal received by the Drovers. The enraged xenos creatures turned upon one another, tearing each other apart and granting the Merovian fighters a tremendous advantage in the battle. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished.{/n}

La población de Pastores no tardó en verse muy reducida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mobil ekipler, güçlü voks hoparlörleriyle donatılmıştı. Hoparlörlerden yayınlanan ses dalgaları dizisi, Çobanların aldığı sinyali bozdu. Öfkeli zenohayvanlar birbirlerine döndü, birbirlerini parçalayarak Merov savaşçılarına savaşta muazzam bir avantaj sağladılar. Çok geçmeden Çoban nüfusu büyük ölçüde azaldı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The mobile teams were equipped with powerful vox-hailers. The sequence of sound waves broadcast through the speakers disrupted the signal received by the Drovers. The enraged xenos creatures turned upon one another, tearing each other apart and granting the Merovian fighters a tremendous advantage in the battle. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mobil ekipler, güçlü voks hoparlörleriyle donatılmıştı. Hoparlörlerden yayınlanan ses dalgaları dizisi, Çobanların aldığı sinyali bozdu. Öfkeli zenohayvanlar birbirlerine döndü, birbirlerini parçalayarak Merov savaşçılarına savaşta muazzam bir avantaj sağladılar. Çok geçmeden Çoban nüfusu büyük ölçüde azaldı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}机动部队配备了大功率音阵通讯器。通过扬声器播放的特定声波序列扰乱了拒生花接收的信号。陷入狂乱的异形生物开始互相撕扯残杀，使梅罗夫战士在战斗中获得了巨大的优势。没过多久，拒生花的数量便被大幅削减。{/n}

The enraged xenos creatures turned upon one another, tearing each other apart and granting the Merovian fighters a tremendous advantage in the battle. Before long, the Drover population was greatly diminished.{/n}
